description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages prepare, test, compile, and release, using the CI_IMAGE variable (${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/ci:1.8) as the Docker image and the docker:dind service for the prepare and release jobs. In the prepare stage add a build_ci_image job that runs on the docker tag, sets DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_HOST, executes apk add -U make bash then make release_ci_image, and only runs for branches matching the regex /\Adocker-ci-image\/.*@tmaczukin/hanging-droplets-cleaner. In the compile stage add a compile job that runs on the docker tag with the same image, executes GODIR="$GOPATH/src/gitlab.com/tmaczukin/hanging-droplets-cleaner", mkdir -p "$(dirname \"$GODIR\")", ln -sfv "$(pwd -P)" "$GODIR", cd "$GODIR", and make deps $CI_JOB_NAME, stores the hanging-droplets-cleaner binary as an artifact for 7 days, and excludes the same regex. In the test stage add static_code_analysis and test jobs that use the identical script steps as compile, run on the docker tag, and also exclude the regex. In the release stage add a release job that runs on the docker tag with docker:dind, inherits the Docker variables, and runs make release_image, while excluding the regex.
